telegram_notification_format.render_pipeline:
APEX MEDIA — Pre-flight Check
Job: Full landscape render EP{N}
Script: {words} words
Audio: {min}m {sec}s

Cost breakdown:
 Scene builder: Claude Code (no API cost)
 Remotion render: $0.00
 ffmpeg assembly + captions: $0.00
 Total API cost this job: $0.00

Proceeding automatically.
telegram_notification_format.shorts_pipeline:
APEX MEDIA — Pre-flight Check
Job: Shorts render EP{N}
Shorts to render: {num}

Cost breakdown:
 Remotion render: $0.00
 ffmpeg clip extraction + captions: $0.00

 Total API cost this job: $0.00

Proceeding automatically.
telegram_notification_format.make_short:
APEX MEDIA — Pre-flight Check
Job: Single Short render EP{N} Short {num}
Scene: {scene}
Clip: {start}s to {end}s ({duration}s)

Cost breakdown:
 Remotion render: $0.00
 ffmpeg mix + captions: $0.00
 Total API cost this job: $0.00

Proceeding automatically.

environment_variables.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN: Read via os.getenv() - uses INFRA_BOT_TOKEN as fallback

notes: All three pipelines now send pre-flight notifications before ANY render or ffmpeg work begins
Notifications arrive via @Apexinfrabot (INFRA_BOT_TOKEN) or via TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN if set
Cost is always $0.00 (all rendering is local, no API calls)
No hardcoded secrets in any file
Backward compatible — all existing functionality preserved
